title: Custom Books & Written Content
description: Learn how to create custom writable and readable books in Minecraft using PaperMC, including titles, pages, lore, and interactive features.

lessons.title: Introduction to Custom Books

quiz.question: Which class represents a book's metadata in Bukkit/PaperMC?
How do you add a page to a book?

lessons.title: Adding Lore, Colors, and Formatting

quiz.question: Which library allows colored and formatted text in books?
How do you add lore to a book?

lessons.title: Clickable Text & Interactive Books

quiz.question: Which ClickEvent action runs a command when clicked?
Can books contain multiple pages with different clickable actions?

lessons.title: Advanced Custom Books

quiz.question: Which method allows combining multiple advanced features in a book?
Can you add clickable text and colored text on the same page?
